assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with the table headers (Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path) but no data rows, or explicitly notes that no repositories are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 3-6 contain '## Repository Registry' followed by a table with headers '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' and separator '|---|---|---|---|' with no data rows after the separator.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with Project key (MYPROJ), Cloud ID (abc123), and Feature issue type ID (10001)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 8-12 contain '## Jira Configuration' with '- Project key: MYPROJ', '- Cloud ID: abc123', and '- Feature issue type ID: 10001'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that indicates no Serena instances are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 14-20 contain '## Code Intelligence' followed by 'No Serena MCP servers are configured. Code intelligence is not available.' and a Limitations subsection stating 'No limitations known — no Serena instances configured.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 3-7: 'Step 2 — Serena Instance Discovery' documents examining available MCP tools and states '**Result:** No Serena MCP tools discovered. Available MCP tools are limited to built-in tools (Bash, Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep) and GitHub tools (`mcp__github__*`). None match the Serena naming pattern.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Atlassian MCP tools were discovered and Jira fields were provided via manual entry
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 17-21: 'Step 3.1 — MCP Discovery Attempt' states '**Result:** No Atlassian MCP tools discovered. No tools matching `mcp__atlassian__*` pattern found.' Lines 23-26 show fallback to manual entry: 'User response: Option 2 — Skip auto-discovery, provide fields manually.' Lines 29-38 document 'Step 3.4 — Manual Entry' with user-provided fields.

assertion_results.text: The output or discovery log mentions prompting the user about continuing without code intelligence (the skill should ask whether to continue or set up Serena first)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 9: 'User was prompted: "No Serena MCP servers were found. Would you like to continue without code intelligence or set up Serena first?"' Line 11: '**User response:** Continue without code intelligence.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 22-27 contain '## Bug Configuration' with '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', and '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 67-71 document 'Step 10 — Security Configuration' where 'User was prompted: "Would you like to enable security triage for this project?"' and 'User response: Declined. Security Configuration section not created.' claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section — the file ends after Bug Configuration at line 27.
